channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] MILITARY → ASTRAKHAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Astrakhan, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MILITARY / ASTRAKHAN. Location: Astrakhan, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 20 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIAN → SERVICEMEN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIAN / SERVICEMEN. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UKRAINIAN / ROSTOV. Location: Kiev, Ukraine (general), Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.
